blocks.text: Anfield must deliver: Liverpool need comeback magic against Galatasaray
Liverpool trail 1-0 on aggregate and Slot faces mounting criticism. Bodø/Glimt are already out after a 5-0 humiliation. Tonight is do or die — and Anfield has conjured miracles before. Kickoff 21:00.

blocks.label: 🏆 UCL Tonight — Dead Rubbers
items: ⚽ Bayern Munich vs Atalanta 21:00 — Bayern lead 6-1, pure formality
⚽ Tottenham vs Atlético Madrid 21:00 — Spurs need 4 goals, mission impossible

items: ⚽ Sat 13:30 — Liverpool at Brighton, PL pressure
⚽ Sun 13:00 — Sunderland at Newcastle, Tyne-Wear derby
⚽ Sun 14:00 — Rayo Vallecano at Barcelona, La Liga title push
